config.friendlycreeper.title: Friend Creeper Settings
Whether the owner can damage their own tamed Creeper.
config.friendlycreeper.followOwner.toolt: Whether tamed Creepers follow their owner.
config.friendlycreeper.revengeOwner.tool: Whether tamed Creepers avenge their owner when attacked.
config.friendlycreeper.snowGolemAttack.t: Whether Snow Golems can target tamed Creepers.
config.friendlycreeper.hurtSound.tooltip: Whether tamed Creepers play a hurt sound when at low health.
config.friendlycreeper.renderPoppy.toolt: Whether to render the poppy on tamed Creepers' heads.
config.friendlycreeper.afraidOfCats.tool: Whether tamed Creepers are afraid of cats and ocelots.
config.friendlycreeper.witherRoseOnLowHe:
Whether tamed Creepers show a wither rose instead of a poppy when at low health.
Requires Render Poppy to be enabled.
screen.friendlycreeper.noconfig.line1: Cloth Config API is not installed
screen.friendlycreeper.noconfig.line2: Please install it before configuring via the graphical interface.
screen.friendlycreeper.noconfig.line3: You can download it from Modrinth or CurseForge.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.friendlyc: Tame Creepers with gunpowder and make them your friend.
